name: AMERICAN LITHIUM MINERALS, INC.
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Business Development We commenced operations as an exploration stage company. In August 2005 we acquired an interest in a 524,728 hectare mineral claim, known as the Raven property, located approximately 17 kilometers northeast of Princeton, in south central British Columbia. However, we were unable to keep the mineral claim in good standing due to lack of funding and our interest in it expired. Pursuant to a mineral property purchase agreement dated June 15, 2009 ...
